_commentScope: Scoped to pure-logic modules. The IPC handlers (main.ts) + secrets.ts depend on the live Electron runtime — mocking them just to mutate would be high-noise, low-signal.
_thresholdsRationale: Ratcheted up as the score has climbed. break=95.5 (set at 96.23 after kpi deterministic revenue snapshot + bepRatio invariant pragma + skills inner optional-chaining equivalent pragma, buffer 0.73). The ratchet is non-decreasing: bump these up as the score climbs further, never lower.
